data.title: Adams Diversified Equity Fund corrects 2025 performance to 2.7% from 2.4%.
data.description: Earlier today, Adams Diversified Equity Fund, Inc. (NYSE: ADX) issued a correction regarding a typographical error in their previous release. The error in the third paragraph stating a 2.4% increase has been corrected to reflect a 2.7% increase instead. This adjustment is important for accuracy in reporting the fund's performance.
Japan’s 5-Year Bond Yield Rises 1.5 Bps, Hits Record 1.645%

data.title: Palantir's software ELITE aids ICE raids with detailed tracking of targets, including names, photos, and home addresses.
data.description: Palantir Technologies, Inc. has created a cutting-edge tracking software called ELITE that is utilized by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to pinpoint and track individuals for deportation in the U.S. The app provides detailed digital maps filled with data to help ICE agents locate targets, displaying names, photos, and "confidence scores" for home addresses. Despite reaching out for comment, there was no response from Palantir at the time of reporting. PLTR stock is currently experiencing movement. For more information on ELITE and its capabilities as described in internal user guides, please visit Benzinga.com.
Bipartisan group of governors to sign an agreement with Trump administration on Friday to curb rising power costs in PJM region covering 13 states-RTRS

data.title: CEO Beth Wozniak drives nVent Electric's transformation by setting ambitious goals, pushes boundaries for success.
data.description: Beth Wozniak, the CEO of NVent Electric, is focused on achieving success through setting specific goals and thresholds. She has played a key role in transforming NVent Electric. For more details on how Beth Wozniak led the transformation, check out Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: EWTN Builds One Global Catholic News Brand: Catholic News Agency and ACI Group Become EWTN News
data.description: EWTN has recently announced the launch of EWTNNews.com, a new free global news content platform. The rebranding involved consolidating Catholic News Agency and its associated international news channels into a single entity under the EWTN umbrella. The development was made official on January 15, 2026, in Washington, marking a significant step in enhancing EWTN's presence in the news sector. This move is expected to amplify the dissemination of Catholic-focused news across the world, catering to a vast audience.

data.title: New Gold Inc. meets 2025 production targets, generating over $530 million in free cash flow; stock listed as TSX: NGD.
data.description: All production targets have been met in all operations, leading to a consolidated full-year free cash flow exceeding $530 million by the end of 2025. New Gold Inc., also known as "New Gold" or the "Company," achieved this significant milestone. The company operates with the stock symbol TSX: NGD. The information was disclosed on January 15, 2026, in Toronto.

data.title: Hugel aims for $798 million in net sales by 2028, with 30% from U.S., focusing on global growth strategy.
data.description: In a recent announcement, President and Global CEO Carrie Strom detailed Hugel's mid-term growth strategy, focusing on global expansion, U.S. channel development, and diversifying the company's product portfolio. Hugel aims to achieve KRW900 billion in total net sales by 2028, with a goal of reaching 30% of sales from the U.S. market. The strategy encompasses a clear vision for international growth and market penetration, with a particular emphasis on strengthening their presence in the U.S. This plan sets ambitious targets for the company's financial performance and market reach in the coming years.

data.title: Hologic will announce Q1 2026 financial results on Jan 29, 2026 in Marlborough, Mass. #earnings $HOLX
data.description: Health technology company Hologic, headquartered in Marlborough, Massachusetts, has scheduled the release of its first quarter fiscal 2026 financial results on January 29, 2026. This announcement will provide stakeholders and investors with insights into the company's performance during the initial months of the fiscal year. Hologic's earnings report for this period is anticipated to shed light on key financial indicators such as revenue, profits, and any notable developments within the organization. Shareholders and industry analysts are keenly awaiting these figures to gauge the company's trajectory and evaluate its fiscal health moving forward.

data.title: Kuleana Rum Works in Hawai‘i declares start of rum's transparency era as additive-free spirits surge in demand.
data.description: In Kohala, Hawai‘i, Kuleana Rum Works has announced the start of rum's transparency era, as consumers increasingly seek additive-free spirits. This trend is reshaping the category, reflecting a growing demand for verified products.

data.title: CAGW opposes codifying Most Favored Nation price controls, calling it disaster for the economy.
data.description: In Washington, a Most Favored Nation policy that codifies price controls is projected to result in significant negative consequences. The policy is anticipated to cause widespread harm, particularly in the realm of government waste, with experts warning that it will lead to an unmitigated disaster. This decision could impact various sectors, including healthcare, commerce, and international relations. The repercussions of implementing such price controls could be far-reaching, affecting numerous aspects of the economy and potentially leading to detrimental outcomes. This proposed policy presents a considerable risk of destabilizing markets and exacerbating existing challenges. The potential ramifications underscore the importance of carefully considering all factors before moving forward with such regulatory measures.

data.title: MyMemo AI debuts MyMemo ONE, a 4-foot humanoid robot, at CES 2026 in Las Vegas.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Las Vegas, MyMemo AI LLC, an AI company from Silicon Valley, introduced its inaugural humanoid home robot, MyMemo ONE, at CES 2026. MyMemo ONE stands at approximately 4 feet (1.22 meters) tall and features cutting-edge AI technology.

data.title: MegPrime gets historic SEC No-Action Letter for 1st universal payments token, MP Token, aiming to transform everyday spending.
data.description: In Dallas, MegPrime Holding, LLC and Megatel Homes, LLC, prominent real estate developers and homebuilders in the US, have been granted a No-Action Letter by the SEC Staff. This allows them to introduce the inaugural universal payments token. Their fintech platform, MegPrime, centers around the MP Token, a digital currency that aims to transform regular expenses into tangible value and financial growth. data.title: Lucasfilm's President Kathleen Kennedy steps down, returning to producing. Two studio veterans now lead.
data.description: Lucasfilm's president Kathleen Kennedy has announced her resignation from the position, opting to return to a production role. In her place, two experienced studio veterans have assumed control of the company. This announcement comes as a significant change for Lucasfilm, with Kennedy's departure marking the end of her tenure as president. The move is noteworthy within the industry, given Kennedy's longstanding association with the company. The transition signifies a new chapter for Lucasfilm, with the two veteran executives set to lead the company forward.
